title: NE63 9XS, SUEZ Recycling and Recovery UK Ltd: environmental permit issued – EPR/UP3494ZL/V007
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: SUEZ Recycling and Recovery UK Ltd   Installation name: Ellington Road Anaerobic Digestion and Composting Facility   Permit number: EPR/UP3494ZL/V007   "
